assumptions.description: Treatment of one unit does not affect outcomes of other units
assumptions.impact: Violation could lead to biased estimates

assumptions.description: All units have non-zero probability of receiving treatment
assumptions.impact: Violation prevents extrapolation to untreated units

assumptions.description: No unmeasured confounders affect both exposure and outcome
assumptions.impact: Almost certainly violated; estimate is likely biased

degradations.message: Sample size 0 with no observed baseline/outcome ledger; no causal estimate is actionable.
No explicit confounder ledger rows were supplied; refusing to fabricate confounders.
